subcodes.first_line: O ye sincere ones, ye longing ones, ye who are drawn as if magnetized, ye who have risen up to serve the Cause of God… As for you, O ye lovers of God, make firm your steps in His Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المخلصون ایها المنجذبون ایها المشتاقون ایها القائمون علی خدمه امر الله و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
